description_long: This is a red, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a black base and a prominent white and red instruction label on the front. The extinguisher features a curved, dark hose attached near the top, looping down and secured along the side. At the top, there is a red handle and lever mechanism, along with a nozzle for discharging the extinguishing agent. The label includes pictograms and text, likely providing usage instructions and safety information. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, typical of painted or powder-coated metal. The overall design is functional and robust, suitable for emergency use in public or private urban environments.
description: A red cylindrical fire extinguisher with a black base, front instructional label, and a dark hose attached to the side. It features a top handle and lever mechanism for operation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the instructional label, handle, lever, and the hose attached to the side.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the back of the cylinder and the hose running along the side, with the handle and lever visible from behind.
description_view_2: Front-side view displaying the label, hose attachment, and the top mechanism, offering a clear look at the operational parts.
description_view_3: Back view showing the plain rear surface of the cylinder, with the hose and top mechanism partially visible.
attribute_label_or_signage: Large rectangular white and red instructional label with text and pictograms on the front of the cylinder.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: A dark, flexible hose is attached near the top, looping down the side and secured with a clip; the hose is medium length and ends in a nozzle.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: A small safety pin is visible at the top near the handle, metallic in color.
